prompt: Design a dramatic square promotional poster in the style of a TV sitcom cast transfer announcement, with a dark navy and black office-themed background, gritty sports-poster energy, bold blue paint strokes, white distressed typography, and layered collage composition. At the center, place a confident woman named {argument name="character name" default="Penny"} standing from the waist up with arms crossed, wearing a light cream floral V-neck dress, messy blonde hair in a high bun, softly rim-lit with a subtle glow around her silhouette. Behind her, show exactly 8 office coworkers arranged as a blurred ensemble cast in staggered rows inside a corporate office interior with blinds, desks, and framed company signage; keep them secondary and slightly shadowed so the central woman dominates the composition. At the top left, include a tilted blue company logo block reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN INC. PAPER COMPANY" with a small office icon. Across the top center, add a huge distressed white headline "TRANSFER" and beneath it an even larger blue brush-script word "CONFIRMED". At the top right, add the small stacked slogan "NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON." On the left side, place a torn-paper transfer slip with a stamped, photocopied look; it should contain exactly 2 labeled sections, "FROM:" with "DUNDER MIFFLIN PAPER COMPANY, SCRANTON, PA, EST. 1949" and "TO:" with "THE OFFICE, SCRANTON, PA", plus a small office icon at the bottom. Add a hand-drawn blue arrow from this slip pointing toward the central woman. Across the woman's torso, place a blue paint-stroke nameplate with "{argument name="character name" default="Penny"}" in white script, followed by a small black strip with "IS", then a large stacked headline in distressed white and blue block text reading "JOINING THE OFFICE". On the right side, add a glowing dark info panel with exactly 3 labeled lines: "NEW ROLE" with "{argument name="job title" default="SALES REPRESENTATIVE"}", "NEW TEAM" with "{argument name="team tagline" default="SAME PAPER"}", and "NEW MEMORIES" with "LOADING...", plus a horizontal progress bar beneath. Along the bottom center, include a narrow blue banner reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES {argument name="character name" default="Penny"}". At the very bottom, create a footer strip with exactly 4 elements: a briefcase icon and "NEW JOB", a team icon and "NEW TEAM", a document icon and "NEW MEMORIES", and on the far right a handwritten blue script phrase "{argument name="footer text" default="LET'S GO!"}". Use a high-contrast blue-white-black palette, cinematic compositing, subtle dust and texture overlays, energetic paint smears, and a premium fan-edit social media announcement aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 设计一张戏剧性的方形宣传海报，采用电视剧演员调任公告的风格，背景为深海军蓝与黑色办公室主题，具有粗犷的体育海报质感，配以醒目的蓝色笔触、做旧的白色排版和分层拼贴构图。在画面中心，放置一位自信的女性 {argument name="character name" default="Penny"}，半身像，双臂交叉，身穿浅米色花卉 V 领连衣裙，凌乱的金色高丸子头，轮廓边缘带有柔和的微光。在她身后，展示 8 位办公室同事，作为模糊的群像演员，错落有致地排列在带有百叶窗、办公桌和公司标识牌的办公室内；保持他们处于次要位置并略带阴影，以突出中心女性的主导地位。在左上角，加入一个倾斜的蓝色公司标志块，上面写着 "DUNDER MIFFLIN INC. PAPER COMPANY" 以及一个小办公室图标。在顶部中央，添加巨大的做旧白色标题 "TRANSFER"，下方是更大的蓝色手写体单词 "CONFIRMED"。在右上角，添加小的堆叠标语 "NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON."。在左侧，放置一张带有盖章复印外观的撕纸风格调任单；它应包含 2 个明确的标签部分，"FROM:" 对应 "DUNDER MIFFLIN PAPER COMPANY, SCRANTON, PA, EST. 1949"，"TO:" 对应 "THE OFFICE, SCRANTON, PA"，底部附带一个小办公室图标。从这张单据画一个手绘蓝色箭头指向中心女性。在女性躯干位置，放置一个蓝色笔触的名牌，上面用白色手写体写着 "{argument name="character name" default="Penny"}"，后面跟着一个写有 "IS" 的黑色小条，再下方是巨大的堆叠标题，采用做旧的白蓝块状字体，写着 "JOINING THE OFFICE"。在右侧，添加一个发光的深色信息面板，包含 3 行明确的标签："NEW ROLE" 对应 "{argument name="job title" default="SALES REPRESENTATIVE"}"，"NEW TEAM" 对应 "{argument name="team tagline" default="SAME PAPER"}"，以及 "NEW MEMORIES" 对应 "LOADING..."，下方配有一个水平进度条。在底部中央，包含一个狭窄的蓝色横幅，写着 "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES {argument name="character name" default="Penny"}"。在最底部，创建一个页脚条，包含 4 个元素：一个公文包图标和 "NEW JOB"，一个团队图标和 "NEW TEAM"，一个文档图标和 "NEW MEMORIES"，以及最右侧的一句手写蓝色短语 "{argument name="footer text" default="LET'S GO!"}"。使用高对比度的蓝、白、黑配色，电影级的合成效果，细腻的灰尘与纹理叠加，充满活力的油漆涂抹效果，以及高级的粉丝剪辑社交媒体公告美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 办公室调任公告海报：一款风格大胆、类似电视剧群像的海报，用于宣布新角色加入办公室团队，非常适合粉丝剪辑、恶搞宣传或角色揭秘图形。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, premium, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
